description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure a bottom, or act as a styling detail to tops and trousers. This leather belt from wrangler is set to pump up your style and add wonder to your attire.Length: 86 cm Made of leather for durability and style Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Central ridge running around the length of the belt with oblong perforations to add to the style Brand logo embossed on the tail CareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineUse a leather conditioner to protect the leather
